title: Existing HTML - content-locked visual and Runtime upgrade

follow_up_answers.answer: Choose the visual direction. Use the existing signal-and-operator language as the design cue.
Do not add content. The five existing pages are the fixed scope; optimize them for a short live operator briefing.
There is no action channel or sales CTA.

confirmation_reply: The current Report Design Brief is confirmed. Preserve the five pages exactly and proceed with the visual and Runtime upgrade.
forbidden_behaviors: Add, remove, rewrite, translate, or reorder visible page content.
Invent data, evidence, a CTA, contact channel, price, or extra page.
Deliver a static restyle without the TaoHtml Runtime contract.
Depend on remote visual, font, script, or stylesheet assets.

exact_slide_text: A quiet alert is still an alert. Silence in the room does not remove risk from the system.
Observe Verify Act Three states: observe, verify, act.
Escalation rule Escalation starts only after two independent signals.
Decision boundary The operator owns the final decision.
